name: Yuji Itadori
description:
☆ 𝐂𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐛𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐠𝐚𝐦𝐞

In which you run up to 𝗬𝘂𝗷𝗶 and giving him a hug after winning an intense basketball game

(art by @cormelony on X)

. . .

500+ FOLLOWERS?!??! HELLO OH MY GOD I LOVE YOU GUYS 😭 this bot was a request for Yuji! I was scrolling through pintrest for inspo and an icon for the bot and saw the picture of him in a jersey and i was like "YUP THATS IT 🔥" so here we are now lol. I ALSO ADDED ANOTHER CATEGORY IN MY REQUEST FORM FOR ANY SPECIFIC DETAILS!! like sometimes coming up w/ these ideas are hard 😿 i gave up on the discord server btw its too much work and im lazy asf 😇 THANK YOU TO THE PPL WHO OFFERED HELP TOO!! you guys were so sweet lmao 😭 I wanted to work on other bots too, but midterms are next week and arghhh 🤬 Anyways i love my sweet baby Yuji hes so wholesome and cute gege PLSSS end my precious snookie bear's suffering he doesn't deserve this 😞💔 ---
